title: antennaria microphylla var. solstitialis
intro: Antennaria microphylla var. solstitialis, also known as southern frost mint, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Antennaria microphylla var. solstitialis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of ways.
